programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: An escape artist's corpse is found in the woods; Booth and Brennan try to decide if the tooth fairy should visit Christine; Angela works on her photography with Sebastian Kohl (Gil Darnell).

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A political journalist is murdered after publishing an article regarding corruption in the NSA; Hodgins' paranoia increases as members of the team realize they are being monitored; Brennan plans a surprise for Booth; a Thanksgiving celebration.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When members of an NCIS Regional Enforcement Action Capabilities Training Team are killed during an explosion, NCIS Special Agent Jessica Knight, the lone surviving member, helps crack the case using high-tech body armor.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While pursuing a dangerous arms dealer, the team is shocked when Bishop is implicated in an old NSA leak; Gibbs and Marcie realize the killer they've been tracking may be onto them.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As the NCIS team searches for Gibbs after wreckage from his boat is discovered; they find out he was tracking a serial killer with journalist Marcie Warren, who wrote an exposé on him.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While trying to find the serial killer Gibbs was after, the NCIS team discovers another person has been tracking the case as well.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and Parker go on a road trip to find one of the serial killer's victims; Agent Knight goes under cover at a large manufacturing company with ties to the murders.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and McGee head to Alaska while the team works at home to uncover the conspiracy behind the serial killer.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the death of a Navy commander whose body suddenly explodes before Jimmy can examine it.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the death of a beloved Navy commander who trained some of the top athletes in the country.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the death of a man on a cruise ship whose body is discovered in the ship's sauna by McGee's mother-in-law.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist's body is found in a beat-up car at the end of a gun range; Kasie weighs the pros and cons of buying a gun.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a hotshot financial adviser is found shot at a naval station, NCIS investigates the case by interviewing the victim's 3D hologram of herself, which she created before her death.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS is called in when Navy Chief Warrant Officer Rafi Nazar is suspected of trying to sell stolen classified Navy software used to pilot combat drones.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: A Flash Challenge using electrical tape tests the teams' creativity, and the artists face challenging placements on their canvases during the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Christian and Cleen's artists work with their teammates in a tag-team tattoo on a single canvas, and one coach puts two of his artists on the chopping block.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Cleen and Christian tattoo four canvases in a grueling head-to-head marathon, and the artists design galactic Elimination Tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists use sidewalk chalk to create multidimensional images in the Flash Challenge, then they face off in a nature-scape Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The coaches face off to save their teams from elimination, and the competitors test their artistry with mermaid Elimination Tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Cleen and Christian take control as each team is challenged to tattoo the rival coach's design, and the losing team tackles a freehand Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Invisible paint is used to create artwork in the Flash Challenge, and the artists set out to capture the beauty of elaborate Japanese temples in the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The teams learn the devil's in the details during a wood-burning Flash Challenge, and a reflective Elimination Tattoo sends another artist packing.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The remaining artists work together with their teams to design powerful tattoos before facing off in head-to-head Grudge Matches.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The teams test their precision skills in a meticulous challenge using crayons, and an animal portrait Elimination Tattoo sends one more artist home.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The final four artists sabotage their competitors with line drawings, and two artists face off in a grueling tattoo marathon to secure a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The finalists and coaches compete in a tag-team tattoo challenge, Cleen and Christian settle the score, and the eliminated artists help the judges crown a new Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Nine men and nine women kick off an epic battle of the sexes by going head to head in a team collaboration tattoo to prove they have what it takes to be the next Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The judges unveil a new twist and bring in heavy-hitting veterans Joey Hamilton and Ryan Ashley to coach the teams, whose black-and-gray shading skills are put to the test.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: After fleeing from the deputy shogun’s estate, Yotsume borrows the power of a Rainbow Pearl to unleash his Dream Gazing spell upon the Half-Demon Princesses, who are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Moroha accepts a job to slay Konton, a member of the Four Perils said to have defeated Meioju, a demon beast with the ultimate armored shell.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The Half-Demon Princesses are tasked with slaying Kinka and Ginka, conjoined twins of the Ka Demon Tribe whose battles for dominance have been wreaking havoc everywhere.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Something wicked lurks in the Man-Eating Pond, devouring any human, beast, or bird that comes near. Towa and Setsuna meet Hikomaru and Chiyo, siblings who lost their parents to the pond.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The demon Nikosen was a sage before evil consumed his soul. Konton orders him to kill the Half-Demon Princesses. Towa struggles as her demon powers fade and she turns into a human.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: When a demon begins to devour virtuous monks and Shinto priests in the region, Hisui is assigned to guard his father, Miroku, who has been undergoing harsh training for the past two years.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa and Setsuna set off to slay Homura, an evil mountain god who has abducted a beautiful maiden. The twins learn that Homura was involved in the forest fire that separated them.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The truth behind the night that sealed the fate of Towa, Setsuna, and Moroha’s parents is finally revealed.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Moroha once had a master named Yawaragi, who was keeping a life-threatening secret. In order to resolve the secret and protect her pupil, Yawaragi made an agreement with Jyubei.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Konton devises a plan to destroy the Half-Demon Princesses. Riku offers to help him out. The three girls are lured into a ravine and fall right into Konton’s trap.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Konton learns of the origins of the Rainbow Pearl and the connection between Kirinmaru and the Dream Butterfly. He summons an ogre to attack the Half-Demon Princesses.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The deputy shogun’s daughter Aiya offers to employ the demon slayers if they win in a battle against the bounty hunters.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Setsuna opens up to Towa about the hidden village for half-demons where she was raised for most of her childhood.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: On the night of the new moon, Riku pays Towa a visit to chat. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one planning to drop by.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Zero removes the seal that Miroku placed on Setsuna to suppress her demon powers, awakening the latent demon blood within.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Setsuna and Towa hire Moroha to help slay Zero. The trio successfully tracks Zero down, but Riku stands in their way.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa, Setsuna, and Moroha are left to confront Kirinmaru, but in the face of overwhelming power, they must pay a great price.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Sesshomaru hands the broken Tenseiga to a grieving Towa, leaving Setsuna's fate in her hands. Will Towa be able to bring Setsuna back to life?

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa learns about a demon that targets women with long, beautiful hair. Meanwhile, Moroha and Setsuna help a nun who isn't exactly what she seems…

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Jaken recalls that fateful day fourteen years ago when Zero placed a curse on Rin. The three girls search for Bokusen-Oh.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The three girls arrive at Mount Musubi but are trapped by a powerful barrier. Moroha manages to escape and runs into something unexpected.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Trapped within Mount Musubi, Rion's soul longs for peace. Rion asks Setsuna to sever the thread of fate connects her to her father, Kirinmaru.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Setsuna is kidnapped by Princess Aiya, daughter of the deputy shogun, who begs Setsuna to be her body double for a day so she can escape her studies.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Takechiyo hires Moroha to help him with the familial strife at his home. Kohaku teaches Towa an important lesson about learning to run away.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Zero sets a trap in the garden of Nanahoshi, a demon who feeds on sadness. Kohaku, Hisui, and Setsuna assist the demon slayers in the north.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The demon slayers struggle to put out the fires caused by the Flame Bulls. Mayonaka demands the villagers hand over the town's divine object.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Moroha learns about the Full Moon Raccoon Dog and Takechiyo's exile. The snow demon Yukinyudo attacks Setsuna. Zero targets Towa on the new moon.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los ochenta, las importaciones de cocaína en Florida estaban entre las más altas del país. El homicidio y la intimidación se impusieron en los territorios.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Kokomo, Indiana, un crimen impensable aterrorizó a los residentes. Una mujer fue secuestrada de su casa una clara mañana de primavera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1997, un triple homicidio aterrorizó a los residentes de la capital del país. En un café en Georgetown, tres empleados fueron asesinados por disparos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Langley, Virginia, un terrorista dispara un arma al tráfico en hora pico. Las víctimas parecían elegidas al azar, pero el motivo podría ser político y apunta a los empleados de la Agencia Central de Inteligencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la Texas rural, una niña de trece años es secuestrada de camino a la escuela. Desesperado por encontrarla a salvo, su padre millonario contacta a las autoridades locales y al FBI.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A mission to rescue an archeologist from Cobra's clutches leads Duke, Alpine, Barbecue and Bazooka on a strange supernatural journey through the tunnels of a pharaoh's tomb, where they have a confrontation with Osiris, the Egyptian god of the dead!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals specimens of a recently discovered dinosaur DNA, and through a sinister scientific process grows its own giant reptiles to battle Joe and bring terror to the world! Gung Ho, Roadblock, and the others must confront these Jurassic beasts.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint visits relatives in a seaside community, but when he discovers the town is actually a Cobra base and its residents are mind-controlled, the vacation is over! It's time for action, and reinforcements are on the way in the W.H.A.L.E. and AWE Striker!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Dusty and Footloose jump with their Mauler tank from a damaged Joe cargo plane, they find themselves in the middle of the desert. They also find themselves in the middle of a tank-on-tank battle with Cobra's latest weapon: The plasma cannon!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attempts to create amphibious soldiers capable of breathing on land and sea. But when the experiment fails and the beautiful test subject Mara can only survive underwater, Cobra hunts her down to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When Dusty needs money to care for his ailing mother, he unknowingly accepts help from Cobra agents. Finding that sensitive information has been leaked to the enemy, the Joe team begins to suspect the young recruit of betrayal.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. A member of the G.I. Joe team has defected to Cobra, and the stakes are high. Sensitive information is now in Cobra hands, with Dusty among their ranks. The Joes have to battle Cobra - and their former friend - in a full on assault!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joe team is placed under the command of Watchdog, the ultimate military computer purchased by the Pentagon to wipe out the forces of terrorism and Cobra. The only problem, thanks to the enemy programming, is that it may be a double agent.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Cobra hijacks a network of communication satellites, the Joes must launch their first space mission. Members undergo an arduous training program to select potential astronauts, resulting in a fierce competition to become the first Joe in space.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A nearly-bankrupt Cobra makes a desperate attempt to stay afloat, disguising Zartan and the Dreadnoks as a new heavy metal band called Cold Slither. Unfortunately, their subliminal mind-control music is a big hit!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. After a battle with Cobra a, Shipwreck is wounded and wakes up in the quaint town of Springfield. The battle actually took place years ago, and Springfield is now his home with his wife Mara, but something doesn't feel right.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a surprise attack by Cobra reveals that the Joes have gotten sloppy, General Hawk enlists Sergeant Slaughter to whip the team back into shape. Meanwhile, Dr. Mindbender plots to build a new Cobra leader from the DNA of famous historic conquerors.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde le pide consejo a Lincoln sobre cómo ser un buen hermano mayor porque se ha enterado de que sus padres van a tener otro hijo; Lori y Leni han comprado dos vestidos idénticos, lo que origina una discusión tremenda en casa de los Loud.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando los Laud ganan un viaje a un complejo, deciden llevar a sus hijos con ellos porque estos prometieron comportarse; cuando Lucy se enamora de un chico normal y corriente, su hermana decide cambiarle el look.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La posición social de Lincoln está en juego cuando su hermana de 4 años de edad entra en su clase de quinto grado; los niños se cansan de que la camioneta familiar se malogre, por lo que deciden tratar de engañar a papá para que compre una nueva.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lola y Lana quieren ser scouts, pero se dan cuenta de que una está más capacitada que la otra para lograrlo; Lincoln y Clyde creen que Bobby está engañando a Lori, por lo que lo siguen a todos lados para recabar pruebas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Papá se enfada con los niños porque nunca cierran la puerta principal de la vivienda, por lo que decide tomar medidas para asegurar que la vivienda esté protegida; Lincoln borra sin querer sus fotos de infancia y Clyde y él intentan recrearlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas creen que Lincoln da mala suerte y le prohíben asistir a sus actividades o colaborar en ellas; cuando Lincoln descubre que en su clase se va a diseccionar ranas, Lana y él emprenden una misión para rescatarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los planes de descanso de primavera de Lincoln y Clyde se ponen en peligro cuando sólo tienen un día para completar su lista; Lori lanza una fiesta sofisticada, pero resulta contraproducente cuando a sus invitados no les gusta lo que había planeado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cansados de comer siempre lo mismo, los niños preparan un sabotaje para poder cenar pizza; Lincoln y Ronnie Anne tienen que cuidar un huevo, pero Lincoln no confía en ella.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde participan en un concurso de cómics para conocer a uno de sus ídolos, pero se llevan una sorpresa poco agradable. Lana trae una nueva mascota a casa y todos la adoran, pero las cuatro mascotas de los Loud confabulan en su contra.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños oyen a Lily decir groserías y les preocupa estar siendo una mala influencia para ella; llega una carta de amor dirigida a "L", y la familia está intrigada por saber para quién va exactamente.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde quieren ser recordados por siempre en la escuela, por ello se proponen colarse en las fotografías de todos los grupos; Lincoln sugiere a sus hermanas que se sometan a un test de compatibilidad porque están siempre discutiendo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Bobby van a la ciudad para visitar a su numerosa familia que es alocada y caótica. Después de ver lo bien que los niños están ahí, la mamá de Ronnie Anne admite que quiere mudarse con su familia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde está preocupado porque Lincoln está triste y trata de animarlo; Lucy utiliza un libro de hechizos para darles a sus hermanos una lección.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia Loud cree que está a salvo de las bromas del Día de los Inocentes porque el bromista Luan se encuentra de campamento; cuando los niños descubren que su padre ya no está en el trabajo antiguo, creen que puede ser su culpa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde descubren que "ARGGH" viene a la ciudad y deciden ir a la grabación. Cansada de sus hermanos, Lori se muda al garaje, pero rápidamente descubre que es más de lo que esperaba.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Para desviar la atención de sus padres sobreprotectores, Clyde arregla todo para que un estudiante de intercambio se quede con ellos. Lola toma a una nueva compañera de clases tímida bajo su protección y la transforma en una mariposa social.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Después de conocer a una familia admirable, los padres Loud temen que sus hijos no estén haciendo lo suficiente como para asegurarse un futuro exitoso; los hermanos deciden asociarse para eliminar a Lynn.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln enseña a sus hermanas cómo pedir dinero a sus padres; Lisa tiene problemas para relacionarse socialmente y esto repercute en sus notas académicas, así que si quiere mejorar en la escuela necesita demostrar a sus maestros que tiene amigos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Monique turns to prostitution for school. Miya admits to sleeping with Lee. Melody pursues LJ!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Stephanie is married and pregnant, but she's not sure if the father is her husband or her boyfriend! Her husband is no hero either because he has a girlfriend too. These guests and others are here to demand a divorce to be with their latest loves.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michele forces her boyfriend to choose between her and his mistress Morgan. Then Rose wants her husband's mistress, Denise, to back off. But there's a catch! Next Dena is here to tell her boyfriend that she's found someone to give her attention.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Crystal found evidence to believe that Chad may really be stepping out on their marriage. Then, Shanna is here to confront her boyfriend Kevin because she has evidence to believe that he's been sleeping with other women!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Daphne is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend, G-Quan! He vows that he loves Wendy. But G-Quan has one final confession. Next Jenna says her husband's constant nagging drove her into the arms of her best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel made a decision that he regrets because he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cecil's wife learns he's with Tammy. Jody leaves her husband for a woman. Becky moves on.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: RiffTrax Special: 90s Cyber Thrillers
programme.desc: Time to grab a stack of floppy disks, or maybe 2 of those shiny CD-ROMs we've been hearing about, and boot up the very first RiffTrax Special! The topic? 90s Cyber Thrillers.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Ice Cream Man
programme.desc: The kids in this sleepy town are concerned their ice cream man might be a murderer who puts human parts in his ice cream. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: At Your Fingertips: Floats (Live Edition)
programme.desc: This short instructs how to build a general TYPE of garbage-craft, a floating garbage craft, rather than focusing on utilizing a specific type of garbage to build a craft. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Three Riffer Edition: Missile to the Moon

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: Overcoming Fear

programme.title: RiffTrax: Mutant
programme.desc: Not so much the X-Men kind of mutant, and not so much the Teenage Ninja Turtle kind of mutant, Mutant is all about that most iconic form of mutant: the one that seems a lot like a zombie.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Honor And Glory

programme.title: Live: BIRDEMIC
programme.desc: Birdemic is one of our favorite bad movies of all time, and there's no better way to watch it than RiffTrax Live. So grab a coat hanger, fire up your solar powered TV and for the love of god fully vest your stock options! Birdemic!

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Vietnam where they must master synchronized dancing, karaoke singing and fishing for prawns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Enemies are made when one team steals another team's taxi in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a leap of faith when choosing which detour challenge to take on. And, a split-second decision may make or break one team's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: "The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Revelations of indiscretions involving a partner come to light; Lucca is brought a new opportunity. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia risks disbarment when Childs' office suspects her of an ethics violation, which could also ruin Peter's political campaign. Meanwhile, a third candidate is revealed in the campaign for state's attorney.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and the partners must decide whether to take on the case of a VIP massage therapist who accuses a Nobel Peace Prize winner of sexual assault. Meanwhile, Peter and Eli try to determine what Wendy's candidacy means for their campaign.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia, Diane, and Will must regroup when caught off-guard by a brilliant disabled attorney, Louis Canning (Michael J. Fox), who uses his condition to sway a jury during a test case for a huge class action suit against a pharmaceutical company.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia is on the road to successfully argue that her teenage pop star client, Sloan, is innocent of a DUI until Cary drops a bombshell that could ruin the starlet's career and life. Meanwhile, Peter's campaign hits a snag.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When the government accuses an alderman of taking a campaign bribe from a Muslim extremist group, the team reviews hours of wiretap evidence to mount his defense, and Alicia is startled to discover that some of the tapes pertain to her.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Alicia gets a vague tip from a courthouse clerk in the appeal case of a death row inmate, the law firm races to secure a stay of execution. Meanwhile, Peter Florrick prepares for his first debate with Glenn Childs and Wendy Scott-Carr.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Sue as they head to the southern tip of Chile to explore the untamed region of Patagonia! The land beneath the towering Andes Mountains is home to Condors, Guanacos, and some of the most beautiful Glaciers in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out the answers to some of nature’s biggest mysteries! Why do gorillas spend so much time in trees, why do male lions have such shaggy manes, why do jellyfish live upside down? You’ve got questions, and Jungle Jack has the answers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Florida to meet some unexpected residents in the small town of Wauchula. Nestled among the orange groves, the Center for Great Apes is providing a loving home to dozens of orangutans and chimpanzees in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits a local market in a Peruvian jungle town to get a first-hand look at how the illegal pet trade is threatening many native species. Then he and Sue meet a man who's making a big difference for hundreds of primates on Monkey Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Countdown to Discovery
programme.desc: Join Jack as he meets up with six of the planet’s most recently discovered animals, like the elusive okapi, adorable pygmy hippo, rare sun-tailed monkey, highly endangered mountain gorilla, the see-through Fijian crested iguana, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and Kathaleen hike up a mountain in Phukett, Thailand to assist in the back-to-the-wild release of two endangered gibbons. The Hannas visit to The Gibbon Sanctuary, where the sick or injured small apes are rehabilitated.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as meets creatures battling back and returning to the wild. Manatees, Bald Eagles, Sea Turtles, Crowned Cranes and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack discovers the incredible dedication of caregivers in the hills of Tennessee's Smoky Mountains. Baby Birds, Raccoons, Possums and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Akagera National Park in Rwanda, once devastated by poaching, to see its transformation and thriving populations of Hippos and Crocodiles and a homecoming for African Crowned Cranes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Supreme Survivors
programme.desc: Whether it’s braving rough seas, extreme temperatures or rugged terrain, or knowing how to outwit an enemy, the creatures on today’s countdown are supremely adapted to survive the extremes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The people of Maui love the endangered humpback. Join Jack, a group of seaworthy school children and the Pacific Whale Foundation for a first-rate expedition to observe these 40-ton gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's comin' home to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio where he gives his grandkids a behind-the-scenes tour. Join in as they learn the ins and outs of zookeeping while meeting amazing animals like elephants, a clouded leopard, and a baby koala.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the survival secrets of crafty prey species. Wildebeest, Zebra, Wombats, Poison Dart Frogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into South Africa's Addo National Park to learn more about its famous Elephant population, and the rest of the Big Seven that call Addo home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi explore Catalina Island, off the coast of California, and track down a herd of wild Bison that have been living there since 1924. They also uncover bats roosting in an old barn and meet the island's local veterinarian.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: After her floatplane touches down on Kulik Lake, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him in the Katmai region of Alaska for some brown bear watching and fly-fishing.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a weird and wonderful countdown celebrating some of the most unique animals on Earth. Pink River Dolphins, Emus, Sichuan Takin, Okapi, Gerenuk, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: What do jackals, sharks and leopards have in common? They’re scavengers, some of the most resourceful creatures! They survive on the remains that hunters leave behind, whether it’s deep in the woods, at the bottom of the sea, or even up a tree!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Devils, Crocs & More
programme.desc: Something eerie is in the air on this Wild Countdown…millions of bats, dancing cobras, real devils and more! Come along as Jungle Jack counts down some of the creepiest creatures he’s met in dark corners around the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: ack and Kathleen visit Joaquin's massive farm outside Guayaquil where he provides a haven for 45 species of animals native to Ecuador, including endangered spectacled bears, tapirs, and great green macaws.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along into the heart of the Amazon River Basin as Jack explores untouched jungles that are teeming with wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's in the Fiji Islands where he prepares for the most hands-on fishing trip of his life. Find out how the local people catch dinner using vines.Then they get a look at the top-secret methods used to create the most colorful pearls in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of his favorite beaches and meets the animals that live there, like Sea Turtles, Sea Lions, and loads of other marine life!

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
